description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-focus-ring

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-focus-ring/`

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `get_design_tokens`, `find_components_using_token`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Ring color, width, offset, border-radius. Dark mode. High contrast mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. Focus indicator visibility (3:1 contrast ratio minimum per WCAG 2.4.11). :focus-visible support. Reduced-motion.
3. **Functionality** — Attach to any focusable element. Keyboard-only focus detection. Custom ring styling. Inset vs outset.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. Integration with other components' focus states. CSS Parts.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — All API documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Focus/blur. Keyboard vs mouse. Customization.
8. **Storybook** — On various elements. Custom styling. Dark mode.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Works with Drupal form elements.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready. Utility component used by others.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-focus-ring
